left_join(a, b, by = "id")

nl: using mtcars, add a column called mpg_cat that is "high" if mpg is above 25, "medium" if mpg is between 15 and 25, and "low" otherwise
generated_code:
mtcars <- mtcars %>%
  mutate(mpg_cat = case_when(
    mpg > 25 ~ "high",
    mpg >= 15 & mpg <= 25 ~ "medium",
    TRUE ~ "low"
  ))
table(mtcars$mpg_cat)

nl: using mtcars, add a column called efficient that is TRUE if mpg is greater than 25, FALSE otherwise
generated_code:
mtcars <- mtcars %>%
  mutate(efficient = mpg > 25)

head(mtcars)

nl: create data frames a=data.frame(x=1:2, y=3:4) and b=data.frame(z=5:6, w=7:8), then row-bind them together
expected_code:

b <- data.frame(x = 5:6, y = 7:8)
bind_rows(a, b)
generated_code:
a <- data.frame(x=1:2, y=3:4)
b <- data.frame(z=5:6, w=7:8)
rbind(a, b)
a <- data.frame(x=1:2, y=3:4)
b <- data.frame(z=5:6, w=7:8)
dplyr::bind_rows(a, b)

nl: using mtcars, make a scatter plot of mpg vs wt and add a smoothed regression line
expected_code:
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = wt)) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm")
generated_code:

  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x) +
  labs(x = "Weight (1000 lbs)", y = "Miles per Gallon",
       title = "MPG vs Weight")

nl: using mtcars, first compute the mean mpg for each cyl, then make a bar chart of those means with cyl as the x-axis and mean mpg as the bar height
expected_code:
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
mtcars %>% group_by(cyl) %>% summarise(mean_mpg = mean(mpg)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cyl), y = mean_mpg)) + geom_col()
generated_code:
mtcars %>% group_by(cyl) %>% summarise(mean_mpg = mean(mpg))
mtcars %>% group_by(cyl) %>% summarise(mean_mpg = mean(mpg)) %>% ggplot(aes(x = factor(cyl), y = mean_mpg)) + geom_col(fill = "steelblue") + labs(x = "cyl", y = "Mean MPG", title = "Mean MPG by Cylinder") + theme_minimal()

nl: using mtcars, make a scatter plot of mpg vs wt with separate panels for each number of cylinders

generated_code:

  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ cyl, labeller = label_both) +
  labs(x = "Weight (1000 lbs)", y = "Miles per Gallon",
       title = "MPG vs Weight by Number of Cylinders") +

nl: using the mpg dataset from ggplot2, make a scatter plot of displ vs hwy with separate panels for different class values and different rows for drv values
expected_code:
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) + geom_point() + facet_grid(drv ~ class)
generated_code:
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
  facet_grid(drv ~ class) +
  labs(
    title = "Highway MPG vs Engine Displacement",
    x = "Engine Displacement (L)",
    y = "Highway MPG"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 7))

generated_code:

  geom_point(size = 3)

nl: create a correlation matrix from mtcars using cor(), reshape it into a long format, then plot it as a heatmap tile chart
expected_code:
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
cor_mat <- cor(mtcars)
cor_long <- melt(cor_mat)
ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) + geom_tile()
generated_code:
cor_mat <- cor(mtcars)
print(round(cor_mat, 3))
cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat))
colnames(cor_long) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "Correlation")
print(head(cor_long, 15))
ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Correlation)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "mtcars Correlation Heatmap", x = "", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

nl: using mtcars with cyl as a factor, compute the mean and standard deviation of mpg for each cylinder count, then plot the means as points with error bars for the standard deviation
expected_code:
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
mtcars %>% group_by(cyl) %>% summarise(mean_mpg = mean(mpg), sd_mpg = sd(mpg)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cyl), y = mean_mpg)) + geom_point() + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_mpg - sd_mpg, ymax = mean_mpg + sd_mpg), width = 0.2)
generated_code:
mtcars$cyl <- factor(mtcars$cyl)

summary_stats <- mtcars %>%
  group_by(cyl) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_mpg = mean(mpg),
    sd_mpg = sd(mpg)
  )

summary_stats

ggplot(summary_stats, aes(x = cyl, y = mean_mpg)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_mpg - sd_mpg, ymax = mean_mpg + sd_mpg), width = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean MPG by Cylinder Count",
    x = "Cylinders",
    y = "MPG (mean ± SD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
